name: outright-productivity-tracker
description: Production-grade Outright BPO Productivity Tracker with environment variable configuration and secure role management

scripts.postinstall: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const path = require('path'); const src = path.join('node_modules', '@azure', 'msal-browser', 'lib', 'msal-browser.min.js'); if (fs.existsSync(src)) { fs.copyFileSync(src, 'msal-browser.min.js'); console.log('MSAL browser library copied locally!'); }"
